testcase.name: testParsingEscapedChars

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: Traceback (most recent call last): File "/Users/ali/miniconda3/envs/alphatrans/lib/python3.10/unittest/case.py", line 59, in testPartExecutor yield File "/Users/ali/miniconda3/envs/alphatrans/lib/python3.10/unittest/case.py", line 591, in run self._callTestMethod(testMethod) File "/Users/ali/miniconda3/envs/alphatrans/lib/python3.10/unittest/case.py", line 549, in _callTestMethod method() File "/Users/ali/Documents/AlphaTrans/data/recomposed_projects-manual/deepseek-coder-33b-instruct/body/commons-fileupload/src/test/org/apache/commons/fileupload/ParameterParserTest.py", line 52, in testParsingEscapedChars params = parser.parse1(s, ";") File "/Users/ali/Documents/AlphaTrans/data/recomposed_projects-manual/deepseek-coder-33b-instruct/body/commons-fileupload/src/main/org/apache/commons/fileupload/ParameterParser.py", line 68, in parse1 return self.parse2(list(str), separator) File "/Users/ali/Documents/AlphaTrans/data/recomposed_projects-manual/deepseek-coder-33b-instruct/body/commons-fileupload/src/main/org/apache/commons/fileupload/ParameterParser.py", line 62, in parse2 return self.parse3(charArray, 0, len(charArray), separator) File "/Users/ali/Documents/AlphaTrans/data/recomposed_projects-manual/deepseek-coder-33b-instruct/body/commons-fileupload/src/main/org/apache/commons/fileupload/ParameterParser.py", line 33, in parse3 paramName = self.__parseToken(["=", separator]) File "/Users/ali/Documents/AlphaTrans/data/recomposed_projects-manual/deepseek-coder-33b-instruct/body/commons-fileupload/src/main/org/apache/commons/fileupload/ParameterParser.py", line 124, in __parseToken return self.__getToken(False) File "/Users/ali/Documents/AlphaTrans/data/recomposed_projects-manual/deepseek-coder-33b-instruct/body/commons-fileupload/src/main/org/apache/commons/fileupload/ParameterParser.py", line 134, in __getToken while (self.__i2 > self.__i1) and (self.__chars[self.__i2 - 1].isspace()): IndexError: list index out of range

The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception:
